critic_notes: Solid section. All six quotes are verbatim substrings of the normalized passage (after joining soft-hyphen line breaks like 'regel­mäßig' → 'regelmäßig', 'Überprü­fung' → 'Überprüfung', 'Be­schlüsse' → 'Beschlüsse'). Correct answers are directly supported; distractors are cleanly wrong (Marktposition, Personalfluktuation, ISB-Leistungsbewertung, etc.). Topic 'methodik' is appropriate for ISMS governance / Managementbewertung. Difficulty labels are reasonable — Q5 as 'experte' is borderline (it's still a list-lookup, just with three correct items), but defensible. All page_start values (24, 25) fall within the section's 24–25 range. Schema sanity: baustein_id and anforderung_type correctly null for the Standards doc.
